<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <title>Learn Vibe-Coding with Myop</title>

    <script type="myop/types">
    interface ToolDetail {
        title: string;
        items: Array<{ heading: string; text: string }>;
        ctaLabel?: string;
        ctaUrl?: string;
    }

    interface Tool {
        id: string;
        name: string;
        description: string;
        icon: string;
        videoUrl?: string;
        detail?: ToolDetail;
    }

    interface Converter {
        id: string;
        name: string;
        description: string;
        icon: string;
    }

    interface MyopInitData {
        tools: Tool[];
        converters: Converter[];
    }

    interface MyopCtaPayloads {
        'cta-clicked': { ctaId: string; ctaLabel: string };
        'get-in-touch': void;
        'open-playground': void;
        'try-playground': void;
        'watch-tutorial': { toolId: string };
    }

    declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
    declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

    declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
        action: K,
        payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
    ): void;
    </script>

    <link href="https://framerusercontent.com/modules/lhLZpGGjF11D3HGVmNbJ/fkGaYkJ2YuNFR9uTZkQu/ABCFavoritLight.css" rel="stylesheet">

    <style>
        :root {
            --purple-5: #F0E8FF;
            --purple-10: #DECCFF;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
            --white: #FFF;
            --panel-bg: #fafafa;
            --bg-color: #ffffff;
            --hover-bg: #f4f4f5;
            --border-color: #e5e5e5;
            --text-color: #18181b;
            --text-secondary: #3E3D3E;
            --accent-blue: #9A70DF;
            --accent-green: #10b981;
            --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);

            /* Typography */
            --hero-h1: 72px;
            --hero-subhead: 20px;
            --section-h2: 40px;
            --section-subhead: 18px;
            --h3: 22px;
            --body-text: 16px;
            --btn-text: 15px;
            --btn-text-content: 13px;

            --hero-h1-mobile: 42px;
            --section-h2-mobile: 36px;

            --weight-light: 200;
            --weight-regular: 300;
            --weight-medium: 400;

            --ls-headers-lg: -2.5px;
            --ls-headers-40: -0.5px;
            --ls-headers-md: -1px;
            --ls-body: 0px;

            --lh-headers: 1.1;
            --lh-body: 1.5;

            --section-padding-lg: 80px;
            --section-padding-sm: 64px;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        button, .play-btn, .cta-button, .cta-button-black, .local-agent-cta {
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        html {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }

        body {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        section[id] {
            scroll-margin-top: 80px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 0px;
            height: 0px;
            background: transparent;
        }

        * {
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow-y: auto;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            background: #FAF5FF;
            color: var(--text-color);
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 40px;
        }

        /* Navigation */
        nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            z-index: 10000;
            padding: 15px 3rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;
            height: 64px;
        }

        nav.nav-hidden {
            transform: translateY(-100%);
        }

        .nav-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 44px;
        }

        .logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-left: -10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .logo svg {
            height: 34px;
            width: auto;
        }

        .nav-links-center {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 38px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-right {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-link {
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: var(--btn-text);
            line-height: 1;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .nav-link:hover {
            color: var(--accent-blue);
        }

        .nav-link.active {
            color: var(--accent-blue);
        }

        .nav-cta {
            padding: 8px 16px;
            background: #ffffff;
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: var(--btn-text);
            border: 1px solid #000000;
            height: 35.5px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-cta:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
        }

        .hamburger {
            display: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .hamburger svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
        }

        /* Mobile Menu */
        .mobile-menu {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: #ffffff;
            transform: translateX(100%);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 99999;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .mobile-menu.open {
            transform: translateX(0);
        }

        .mobile-menu-header {
            padding: 15px 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            height: 64px;
        }

        .mobile-menu-close {
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .mobile-menu-links {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 0;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .mobile-link {
            width: 100%;
            height: 51px;
            padding: 0 1.5rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: var(--body-text);
            font-weight: 400;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .mobile-link:hover {
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .mobile-cta {
            margin: 16px 1.5rem;
            height: 44px;
            padding: 0 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: var(--btn-text);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* Hero Section */
        .hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 184px 0 80px;
            position: relative;
            background: transparent;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background: #faf5ff;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob {
            position: absolute;
            border-radius: 50%;
            will-change: transform;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob-1 {
            width: 120vmax;
            height: 120vmax;
            left: -40%;
            top: -20%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(243, 232, 255, 0.6) 50%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(80px);
            animation: meshBlob1 20s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .hero-mesh-bg .blob-2 {
            width: 100vmax;
            height: 100vmax;
            right: -30%;
            top: -20%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 40%, transparent 70%);
            filter: blur(60px);
            animation: meshBlob2 26.7s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes meshBlob1 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(15%, 20%) scale(1.1) rotate(5deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(25%, 10%) scale(0.95) rotate(-3deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(10%, 25%) scale(1.05) rotate(3deg); }
        }

        @keyframes meshBlob2 {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(0%, 0%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: translate(-20%, 15%) scale(1.08) rotate(-4deg); }
            50% { transform: translate(-10%, 30%) scale(0.92) rotate(5deg); }
            75% { transform: translate(-25%, 5%) scale(1.04) rotate(-2deg); }
        }

        .hero .container {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            text-align: center;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .hero-title {
            font-size: var(--hero-h1);
            font-weight: var(--weight-light);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            margin-bottom: 24px;
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-lg);
            max-width: 700px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.2s;
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-size: var(--hero-subhead);
            font-weight: var(--weight-light);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            max-width: 400px;
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.3s;
        }

        @keyframes fadeInUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(20px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        /* Button Styles */
        .cta-button {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: var(--btn-text-content);
            font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
            padding: 0 24px;
            height: 40px;
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #18181b;
            border: 1px solid #000000;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            text-decoration: none;
            gap: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .cta-button:hover {
            background: #000000;
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .cta-button-black {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: var(--btn-text-content);
            font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
            padding: 0 24px;
            height: 40px;
            background: #18181b;
            color: #ffffff;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .cta-button-black:hover {
            color: #e4e4e7;
        }

        .hero-cta {
            opacity: 0;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.4s;
        }

        /* Section Divider */
        .section-divider {
            height: 1px;
            background: var(--border-color);
            max-width: calc(100% - 160px);
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        /* Playground Section */
        .playground-section {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #FAF5FF;
        }

        .playground-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 1fr;
            gap: 52px;
            align-items: stretch;
        }

        .playground-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .playground-content .tool-row-cta {
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        .playground-content .tool-row-cta .cta-button {
            font-size: 15px;
        }

        .playground-visual {
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Playground Video */
        .playground-video-wrap {
            width: 100%;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
        }

        .playground-video-wrap::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            z-index: 5;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .playground-video-wrap video {
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            border-radius: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .playground-video-wrap.playing video {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .playground-thumbnail {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 16px;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            background-image: url('https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Screenshot_2026-02-03_at_9.38.37.png');
            background-size: 100% 100%;
            background-position: center;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        .playground-video-wrap.playing .playground-thumbnail {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .playground-thumbnail-title {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #fff;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        }

        .playground-video-wrap .play-btn {
            width: 64px;
            height: 64px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .playground-video-wrap:hover .play-btn {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .playground-video-wrap .play-btn svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            color: #ccc;
            margin-left: 2px;
        }

        .playground-content h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            max-width: 420px;
        }

        .playground-content p {
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        /* Accordion */
        .accordion {
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }

        .accordion-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }

        .accordion-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 20px 0;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 300;
            font-size: 17px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .accordion-icon {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #999;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .accordion-item.active .accordion-icon {
            transform: rotate(45deg);
        }

        .accordion-body {
            display: none;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.7;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .accordion-item.active .accordion-body {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Quote Section */
        .quote-section {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #FAF5FF;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .quote-section h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            font-style: italic;
        }

        .quote-section .quote-author {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 200;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .quote-section .cta-button {
            display: inline-flex;
        }

        /* Collapsible sections - hidden by default */
        .tools-section,
        .why-section,
        .ide-video-section,
        .local-agent-section {
            display: none;
        }

        .tools-section.expanded,
        .why-section.expanded,
        .ide-video-section.expanded,
        .local-agent-section.expanded {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Tools Section */
        .tools-section {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        .tools-header {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 60px;
        }

        .tools-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .tools-header p {
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: var(--weight-light);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            max-width: 750px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        /* (tool cards removed — all tools shown as open rows) */

        /* Tool Rows (all open) */
        .tools-rows {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 60px;
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .tool-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 60px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .tool-row:nth-child(even) {
            direction: rtl;
        }

        .tool-row:nth-child(even) > * {
            direction: ltr;
        }

        .tool-row-video {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 459 / 309;
            border-radius: 16px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
            overflow: visible;
        }

        /* Different backgrounds for each tool */
        .tool-row-video.gradient-1,
        .tool-row-video.gradient-2,
        .tool-row-video.gradient-3 {
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        .tool-row-video .play-btn {
            width: 64px;
            height: 64px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .tool-row-video:hover .play-btn {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .tool-row-video .play-btn svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            margin-left: 2px;
        }

        .tool-row-video .play-btn svg path {
            fill: white;
        }

        .tool-row-video-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 16px;
            z-index: 2;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            background-size: 97% auto;
            background-position: center;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-color: #ffffff;
            border-radius: 6px;
        }

        .tool-row-video.playing .tool-row-video-overlay {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .tool-row-video-label {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #fff;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        }

        .tool-row-video video {
            position: absolute;
            top: -10px;
            left: -10px;
            width: calc(100% + 10px);
            height: calc(100% + 10px);
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 16px;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .tool-row-video.playing video {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* play-btn visibility handled by .tool-row-video-overlay */

        .tool-row-text h3 {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 300;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .tool-row-desc {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.5;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .tool-row-text ul {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .tool-row-text ul li {
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .tool-row-text ul li strong {
            color: var(--text-color);
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        .tool-row-cta {
            margin-top: 24px;
        }

        .tool-row-cta .cta-button {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .tool-row-cta .cta-button:hover {
            color: var(--accent-blue);
            background: none;
        }

        .tool-row-cta .cta-button svg {
            transition: transform 0.15s ease;
        }

        .tool-row-cta .cta-button:hover svg {
            transform: translateX(3px);
        }

        /* Converters Section (Steps) */
        .converters-section {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #FAF5FF;
        }

        .converters-header {
            text-align: left;
            margin-bottom: 60px;
        }

        .converters-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            max-width: 700px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .converters-header p {
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: var(--weight-light);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .steps-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 40px;
        }

        .step-card {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        .step-icon {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #18181b;
            border-radius: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }

        .step-icon svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            color: #fff;
        }

        .step-title {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }

        .step-text {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        /* Steps Video Section */
        .steps-video-section {
            padding: 0 0 var(--section-padding-lg);
            background: #FAF5FF;
        }

        .steps-video-wrap {
            width: 70%;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: transparent;
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
        }

        .steps-video-wrap video {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            display: block;
            border-radius: 16px;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .steps-video-wrap.playing video {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .steps-video-thumbnail {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 16px;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            background-image: url('https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/agent_thumbnail.png');
            background-size: 100% 100%;
            background-position: center;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        .steps-video-wrap.playing .steps-video-thumbnail {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .steps-video-thumbnail-title {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #fff;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        }

        .steps-video-thumbnail-tools {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 24px;
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        }

        .steps-video-wrap .play-btn {
            width: 64px;
            height: 64px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .steps-video-wrap:hover .play-btn {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .steps-video-wrap .play-btn svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            color: #fff;
            margin-left: 2px;
        }

        /* Video Controls - Sound & Expand */
        .video-controls {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 12px;
            right: 12px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            z-index: 10;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .playing .video-controls {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        .video-controls button {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 0;
            transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
            color: #fff;
        }

        .video-controls button:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .video-controls button svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            fill: #fff;
        }

        .video-controls .sound-off-icon { display: block; }
        .video-controls .sound-on-icon { display: none; }
        .sound-on .video-controls .sound-off-icon { display: none; }
        .sound-on .video-controls .sound-on-icon { display: block; }

        /* Fullscreen video overlay */
        .video-fullscreen-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
            z-index: 10000;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .video-fullscreen-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        .video-fullscreen-overlay video {
            max-width: 90vw;
            max-height: 90vh;
            border-radius: 12px;
        }

        .video-fullscreen-overlay .fullscreen-close {
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: background 0.2s ease;
        }

        .video-fullscreen-overlay .fullscreen-close:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }

        /* IDE Video Section */
        .ide-video-section {
            padding: 0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        .ide-video-wrap {
            width: 70%;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: transparent;
            min-aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
        }

        .ide-video-wrap video {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .ide-video-wrap.playing video {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .ide-video-thumbnail {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 16px;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            background-image: url('https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Screenshot_2026-02-02_at_23.26.42.png');
            background-size: 100% 100%;
            background-position: center;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        .ide-video-wrap.playing .ide-video-thumbnail {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .ide-video-thumbnail-title {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #fff;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        }

        .ide-video-wrap .play-btn {
            width: 64px;
            height: 64px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .ide-video-wrap:hover .play-btn {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }

        .ide-video-wrap .play-btn svg {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
        }

        /* Why Section */
        .why-section {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .why-inner {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 60px;
        }

        .why-content h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .why-content p {
            font-size: var(--body-text);
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
        }

        .why-visual {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .why-card {
            background: #FCFAFF;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 24px;
        }

        .why-card-icon {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            background: #18181b;
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .why-card-title {
            font-weight: 300;
            font-size: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .why-card-text {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .why-card-links {
            margin-top: 12px;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px 16px;
        }

        .why-card-link {
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: underline;
            text-underline-offset: 2px;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .why-card-link:hover {
            color: var(--accent-blue);
        }

        /* Local Agent Section */
        .local-agent-section {
            padding: var(--section-padding-lg) 0;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .local-agent-inner {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .local-agent-header h2 {
            font-size: var(--section-h2);
            font-weight: var(--weight-regular);
            line-height: var(--lh-headers);
            letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-40);
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .local-agent-header p {
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
        }

        .local-agent-text {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 24px;
        }

        .local-agent-text p {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: var(--lh-body);
            max-width: 500px;
        }

        .local-agent-text .cta-button {
        }

        .local-agent-cta:hover svg {
            transform: translateX(3px);
        }

        /* CTA Gradient Section */
        /* Footer */
        .footer-wrapper {
            background: white;
            width: 100%;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .footer-container {
            max-width: 1440px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 40px 24px;
        }

        .footer-content {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            margin-top: 40px;
        }

        .footer-column {
            margin-left: 125px;
        }

        .footer-column h3 {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 400;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #000000;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        .footer-column ul {
            list-style: none;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a {
            color: #0A090A;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            text-align: center;
        }

        .footer-bottom p {
            color: #000000;
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 905px) {
            nav {
                padding: 15px 1.5rem;
            }

            .nav-links-center,
            .nav-links-right {
                display: none;
            }

            .hamburger {
                display: block;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 906px) {
            .mobile-menu {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .desktop-br {
                display: none;
            }
            .container {
                padding: 0 30px;
            }

            .hero {
                padding: 112px 0 40px;
            }

            .hero-title {
                font-size: var(--hero-h1-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }

            .hero-subtitle {
                max-width: 250px;
            }

            .playground-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 40px;
            }

            .playground-content {
                order: -1;
            }

            .why-visual {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .tool-row {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 30px;
            }

            .tool-row:nth-child(even) {
                direction: ltr;
            }

            .steps-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 30px;
            }

            .steps-video-wrap,
            .ide-video-wrap {
                width: 100%;
            }

            .playground-content h2,
            .why-content h2,
            .tools-header h2,
            .converters-header h2,
            .cta-gradient-section h2 {
                font-size: var(--section-h2-mobile);
                letter-spacing: var(--ls-headers-md);
            }

            .why-visual {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .why-section {
                padding: 60px 0;
            }

            .local-agent-header p {
                max-width: 300px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .footer-content {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            }

            .footer-column {
                margin-left: 0;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section {
                padding: 64px 16px 64px 16px;
                align-items: center;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section h2,
            .cta-gradient-section p {
                max-width: 300px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section::before {
                width: 100%;
                height: 400px;
                top: -150px;
            }
        }

        /* (small screen tools handled by 768px breakpoint) */
    </style>
</head>

                        <h2>Build with IDE tools</h2>
                        <p>For complex components, builders can use tools like Cursor or Claude Code to create components, yet their work remains isolated from the source code. Why? To protect the core codebase while builders experiment freely. When the component is ready, engineers plug it back with a one-time command.</p>
                    </div>

                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="why-card">

                            <div class="why-card-title">Step 2: Install an AI Code Editor</div>

                            <div class="why-card-links">
                                <a href="https://cursor.com/download" target="_blank" class="why-card-link">Cursor</a>

                                <a href="https://antigravity.dev" target="_blank" class="why-card-link">Antigravity</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="why-card">
                            <div class="why-card-icon">3</div>
                            <div class="why-card-title">Step 3: Connect Your Editor to Myop</div>
                            <div class="why-card-text">Follow the Myop MCP setup guide to connect your editor.</div>
                            <div class="why-card-links">
                                <a href="https://docs.myop.dev/docs/mcp-setup" target="_blank" class="why-card-link">Myop MCP setup guide</a>
                                <a href="https://cursor.com/blog/mcp" target="_blank" class="why-card-link">Cursor MCP guide</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="why-card">
                            <div class="why-card-icon">4</div>
                            <div class="why-card-title">Step 4: Build & Upload to Myop</div>
                            <div class="why-card-text">Build your component within the IDE, when ready write: Upload to Myop.</div>
                        </div>

    (function() {

        const defaultTools = [

                videoUrl: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Myop_agent__3_.mp4',
                thumbnailUrl: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Screenshot_2026-02-03_at_9.38.02.png',
                detail: {

                        { heading: 'Smart defaults', text: 'Preconfigured with production-ready best practices for Myop components.' }
                    ],
                    ctaLabel: 'Build with Myop Pixie',
                    ctaUrl: 'https://dashboard.myop.dev'
                }
            },
            {
                id: 'claude', name: 'Claude (Pro, Max)', description: "Anthropic's AI. Considered the best for coding.", icon: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1768671939617-Claude.png',
                videoUrl: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Claude___Figma_app_tutorial__3_.mp4',
                thumbnailUrl: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Screenshot_2026-02-02_at_23.28.51.png',
                detail: {
                    title: 'Claude (Pro, Max)',
                    items: [
                        { heading: 'MCP connection', text: 'Start with connecting Myop and Figma MCP.' },
                        { heading: 'Screenshot to code', text: 'Exceptional results turning designs into working components.' },
                        { heading: 'Real-time preview', text: 'See your changes rendered as you iterate.' }
                    ],
                    ctaLabel: 'Build with Claude',
                    ctaUrl: 'https://claude.ai'
                }
            },
            {
                id: 'gemini', name: 'Gemini (Pro, Ultra)', description: "Google's AI. Fast iteration, strong visuals.", icon: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1768671939617-Gemini.png',
                videoUrl: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Gemini_app_tutorial__1_.mp4',
                thumbnailUrl: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/4ac54bb4-352d-4a80-a010-410b72e0fe6a/Screenshot_2026-02-02_at_23.27.18.png',
                detail: {
                    title: 'Gemini (Pro, Ultra)',
                    items: [
                        { heading: 'Start with prompt', text: 'Copy the prompt from Myop for an easy start.' },
                        { heading: 'Canvas mode', text: 'See your changes rendered in real-time as you iterate.' },
                        { heading: 'Natural language prompts', text: 'Describe what you want in plain English and watch it come to life.' }
                    ],
                    ctaLabel: 'Build with Gemini',
                    ctaUrl: 'https://gemini.google.com'
                }
            }
        ];

        const defaultConverters = [
            { id: 'screenshot-claude', name: 'Screenshot → Code', description: 'Snap any UI. Get a component back. Upload a screenshot and let AI turn it into a production-ready Myop component.', icon: '⎔' },
            { id: 'figma-claude', name: 'Figma → Code', description: 'Design to pixel-perfect component. Connect your Figma file and generate clean, deployable code automatically.', icon: '◐' }
        ];

        function playBtnHTML() {
            return '<div class="play-btn"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="white" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/></svg></div>';
        }

        function renderToolRow(tool, index) {
            var gradientClass = 'gradient-' + (index + 1);
            var itemsHTML = tool.detail.items.map(function(item) {
                return '<li><strong>' + item.heading + ':</strong> ' + item.text + '</li>';
            }).join('');

            var ctaLabel = tool.detail.ctaLabel || ('Build with ' + tool.name);
            var ctaUrl = tool.detail.ctaUrl || '#';
            var descHTML = tool.description ? '<p class="tool-row-desc">' + tool.description + '</p>' : '';
            var videoEl = tool.videoUrl
                ? '<video src="' + tool.videoUrl + '" muted loop playsinline preload="metadata"></video>'
                : '';
            var thumbStyle = tool.thumbnailUrl ? ' style="background-image: url(\'' + tool.thumbnailUrl + '\')"' : '';
            var overlay = '<div class="tool-row-video-overlay"' + thumbStyle + '>' + playBtnHTML() + '</div>';
            var controls = '<div class="video-controls">' +
                '<button onclick="event.stopPropagation(); toggleVideoSound(this)" title="Toggle sound">' +
                    '<svg class="sound-off-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M16.5 12c0-1.77-1.02-3.29-2.5-4.03v2.21l2.45 2.45c.03-.2.05-.41.05-.63zm2.5 0c0 .94-.2 1.82-.54 2.64l1.51 1.51C20.63 14.91 21 13.5 21 12c0-4.28-2.99-7.86-7-8.77v2.06c2.89.86 5 3.54 5 6.71zM4.27 3L3 4.27 7.73 9H3v6h4l5 5v-6.73l4.25 4.25c-.67.52-1.42.93-2.25 1.18v2.06c1.38-.31 2.63-.95 3.69-1.81L19.73 21 21 19.73l-9-9L4.27 3zM12 4L9.91 6.09 12 8.18V4z"/></svg>' +
                    '<svg class="sound-on-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9v6h4l5 5V4L7 9H3zm13.5 3c0-1.77-1.02-3.29-2.5-4.03v8.05c1.48-.73 2.5-2.25 2.5-4.02zM14 3.23v2.06c2.89.86 5 3.54 5 6.71s-2.11 5.85-5 6.71v2.06c4.01-.91 7-4.49 7-8.77s-2.99-7.86-7-8.77z"/></svg>' +
                '</button>' +
                '<button onclick="event.stopPropagation(); expandVideo(this)" title="Expand">' +
                    '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M7 14H5v5h5v-2H7v-3zm-2-4h2V7h3V5H5v5zm12 7h-3v2h5v-5h-2v3zM14 5v2h3v3h2V5h-5z"/></svg>' +
                '</button>' +
            '</div>';
            return '<div class="tool-row">' +
                '<div class="tool-row-video ' + gradientClass + '" onclick="toggleToolVideo(this, event)">' + videoEl + overlay + controls + '</div>' +
                '<div class="tool-row-text">' +
                    '<h3>' + tool.detail.title + '</h3>' +
                    descHTML +
                    '<ul>' + itemsHTML + '</ul>' +
                    '<div class="tool-row-cta"><a class="cta-button" href="' + ctaUrl + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">' + ctaLabel + ' <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></a></div>' +
                '</div>' +
            '</div>';
        }

        // Steps section is now static HTML - no render needed

        function render(data) {
            var tools = data.tools || defaultTools;
            // Render tools rows (all open)
            var toolsRows = document.getElementById('tools-rows');
            if (toolsRows) {
                toolsRows.innerHTML = tools.map(function(tool, index) {
                    return renderToolRow(tool, index);
                }).join('');
            }
        }

        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) return currentState;
            currentState = data;
            render(data);
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            console.log('CTA:', action_id, payload);
        };

        // Expand/collapse deeper sections (toggle)
        window.expandDeeperSections = function() {
            var toolsSection = document.getElementById('section-tools');
            var isExpanded = toolsSection.classList.contains('expanded');

            var appRoot = document.getElementById('app-root');

            if (isExpanded) {
                // Collapse all sections
                toolsSection.classList.remove('expanded');
                document.getElementById('section-ide').classList.remove('expanded');
                document.querySelector('.ide-video-section').classList.remove('expanded');
                document.querySelector('.local-agent-section').classList.remove('expanded');

                // Scroll back to quote section
                requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        var quote = document.querySelector('.quote-section');
                        if (quote && appRoot) {
                            var quoteTop = quote.getBoundingClientRect().top + appRoot.scrollTop - (appRoot.clientHeight / 2) + (quote.offsetHeight / 2);
                            appRoot.scrollTo({ top: quoteTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
                        }
                    }, 50);
                });
            } else {
                // Expand all sections
                toolsSection.classList.add('expanded');
                document.getElementById('section-ide').classList.add('expanded');
                document.querySelector('.ide-video-section').classList.add('expanded');
                document.querySelector('.local-agent-section').classList.add('expanded');

                // Scroll to tools section smoothly
                requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        if (appRoot) {
                            var targetTop = toolsSection.getBoundingClientRect().top + appRoot.scrollTop - 80;
                            appRoot.scrollTo({ top: targetTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
                        }
                    }, 50);
                });
            }
        };

        // Expand sections and scroll to specific section (for nav links)
        window.expandAndScrollTo = function(event, sectionId) {
            event.preventDefault();

            var appRoot = document.getElementById('app-root');
            var alreadyExpanded = document.getElementById('section-tools').classList.contains('expanded');

            // Expand all deeper sections
            document.getElementById('section-tools').classList.add('expanded');
            document.getElementById('section-ide').classList.add('expanded');
            document.querySelector('.ide-video-section').classList.add('expanded');
            document.querySelector('.local-agent-section').classList.add('expanded');

            // Ensure nav is visible when user clicks a nav link
            var nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
            if (nav) {
                nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
            }

            function doScroll() {
                var target = document.getElementById(sectionId);
                if (target && appRoot) {
                    var targetTop = target.getBoundingClientRect().top - appRoot.getBoundingClientRect().top + appRoot.scrollTop - 80;
                    appRoot.scrollTo({ top: targetTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            }

            if (alreadyExpanded) {
                // Sections are already visible, scroll immediately
                doScroll();
            } else {
                // Sections just became visible, wait for layout then scroll
                requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                    setTimeout(doScroll, 50);
                });
            }
        };

        // Generic video toggle (play/pause)
        function genericToggleVideo(container, e) {
            if (e && e.target.closest('.video-controls')) return;
            var video = container.querySelector('video');
            if (!video) return;
            if (video.paused) {
                video.play();
                container.classList.add('playing');
            } else {
                video.pause();
                container.classList.remove('playing');
            }
        }

        window.togglePlaygroundVideo = function(container, e) { genericToggleVideo(container, e); };
        window.toggleStepsVideo = function(container, e) { genericToggleVideo(container, e); };
        window.toggleToolVideo = function(container, e) { genericToggleVideo(container, e); };
        window.toggleIdeVideo = function(container, e) { genericToggleVideo(container, e); };

        // Toggle sound on/off for a video
        window.toggleVideoSound = function(btn) {
            var container = btn.closest('.playground-video-wrap, .steps-video-wrap, .tool-row-video, .ide-video-wrap');
            if (!container) return;
            var video = container.querySelector('video');
            if (!video) return;
            video.muted = !video.muted;
            if (video.muted) {
                container.classList.remove('sound-on');
            } else {
                container.classList.add('sound-on');
            }
        };

        // Expand video to fullscreen overlay
        window.expandVideo = function(btn) {
            var container = btn.closest('.playground-video-wrap, .steps-video-wrap, .tool-row-video, .ide-video-wrap');
            if (!container) return;
            var srcVideo = container.querySelector('video');
            if (!srcVideo || !srcVideo.src) return;

            var overlay = document.getElementById('videoFullscreen');
            var fsVideo = overlay.querySelector('video');
            fsVideo.src = srcVideo.src;
            fsVideo.currentTime = srcVideo.currentTime;
            fsVideo.muted = srcVideo.muted;

            if (srcVideo.muted) {
                overlay.classList.remove('sound-on');
            } else {
                overlay.classList.add('sound-on');
            }

            overlay.classList.add('active');
            fsVideo.play();

            // Pause the original
            srcVideo.pause();
            container.classList.remove('playing');

            // Store reference to return to
            overlay._sourceContainer = container;
            overlay._sourceVideo = srcVideo;
        };

        // Close fullscreen
        window.closeFullscreen = function() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('videoFullscreen');
            var fsVideo = overlay.querySelector('video');
            fsVideo.pause();
            overlay.classList.remove('active');

            // Resume source video
            if (overlay._sourceContainer && overlay._sourceVideo) {
                overlay._sourceVideo.currentTime = fsVideo.currentTime;
                overlay._sourceVideo.play();
                overlay._sourceContainer.classList.add('playing');
            }

            fsVideo.src = '';
        };

        // Toggle sound in fullscreen
        window.toggleFullscreenSound = function() {
            var overlay = document.getElementById('videoFullscreen');
            var fsVideo = overlay.querySelector('video');
            fsVideo.muted = !fsVideo.muted;
            if (fsVideo.muted) {
                overlay.classList.remove('sound-on');
            } else {
                overlay.classList.add('sound-on');
            }
        };

        // Close fullscreen on Escape key
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                var overlay = document.getElementById('videoFullscreen');
                if (overlay.classList.contains('active')) {
                    closeFullscreen();
                }
            }
        });

        // Close fullscreen on clicking background
        document.getElementById('videoFullscreen').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (e.target === this) {
                closeFullscreen();
            }
        });

        window.toggleAccordion = function(header) {
            var item = header.parentElement;
            var wasActive = item.classList.contains('active');

            document.querySelectorAll('.accordion-item').forEach(function(i) {
                i.classList.remove('active');
            });

            if (!wasActive) {
                item.classList.add('active');
            }
        };

        // Sticky Navigation
        var nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
        var lastScrollTop = 0;
        var isNavHidden = false;

        document.getElementById('app-root').addEventListener('scroll', function() {
            var scrollTop = this.scrollTop;

            if (Math.abs(scrollTop - lastScrollTop) < 5) return;

            if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
                if (!isNavHidden) {
                    nav.classList.add('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = true;
                }
            } else if (scrollTop < lastScrollTop) {
                if (isNavHidden) {
                    nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = false;
                }
            }

            if (scrollTop <= 0) {
                nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                isNavHidden = false;
            }

            lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
        }, { passive: true });
    })();
    </script>
